title: Summarizing a Large Dataset with Entity Recognition
scenario: Create a prompt to summarize a large dataset of customer reviews with entity recognition. The output should be a clear and concise markdown table with the following columns: 'Entity Type', 'Entity Value', 'Frequency', 'Sentiment'. The table should show the most frequently mentioned entities and their corresponding sentiment. The prompt should include specific instructions for handling named entity recognition and sentiment analysis.
constraints: Use markdown formatting for the table
Include specific instructions for handling named entity recognition and sentiment analysis

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown table meets the formatting and handling instructions.
Evaluate the accuracy of the entity recognition for each row of the table.
Ensure the sentiment analysis accurately represents the tone of each review.
